case_title: MICHAEL ANGELS KELLY JR VS. TONY CHASE

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL ANGELS KELLY JR. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF HAS ALREADY RECEIVED A JUDGMENT IN CASE 855973 FOR THE SAME ALLEGATIONS AGAINST EMPLOYER AND IS THEREFORE NOT ALLOWED TO BRING THE SAME SUIT AGAINST EMPLOYEES (RES JUDICATA). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL / SENT TO PLAINTIFF / UNABLE TO FORWARD.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY KELLY JR, MICHAEL ANGELS AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE, TONY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KELLY JR, MICHAEL ANGELS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED FEB-21-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHASE, TONY
